'use strict' let Container = require('./container') let Input = require('./input') let Parser = require('./parser') function parse(css, opts) { let input = new Input(css, opts) let parser = new Parser(input) try { parser.parse() } catch (e) { if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') { if (e.name === 'CssSyntaxError' && opts && opts.from) { if (/\.scss$/i.test(opts.from)) { e.message += '\nYou tried to parse SCSS with ' + 'the standard CSS parser; ' + 'try again with the postcss-scss parser' } else if (/\.sass/i.test(opts.from)) { e.message += '\nYou tried to parse Sass with ' + 'the standard CSS parser; ' + 'try again with the postcss-sass parser' } else if (/\.less$/i.test(opts.from)) { e.message += '\nYou tried to parse Less with ' + 'the standard CSS parser; ' + 'try again with the postcss-less parser' } } } throw e } return parser.root } module.exports = parse parse.default = parse Container.registerParse(parse)
